---
# title: 'Welcome to the Masiello Group: <span style="color:#757883">light-matter theory at the nanoscale</span>'
# subtitle: "light-matter theory at the nanoscale"
page-layout: full
---
<div class="gradient-text">

<div class="welcome-headline">
Welcome to the Analytics for Non Profit Researhch Group<br>
</div>
<div class="welcome-subheadline">
Mapping Nature, Society, and Solutions
</div>
</div>

::::{.cmm-background}
::: {.content-container}
::: {.welcome }


::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4 .welcome-text .sand-background style="padding: 15px;"}

We are a collective of researchers with diverse expertise spanning computer vision, data science, environmental science, and social science, working at the intersection of **analytics and real-world challenges**. Our group collaborates with nonprofit organizations and academic institutions to drive impactful research in areas like **urbanization, biodiversity, and language preservation**, using cutting-edge methodologies in **machine learning, spatial analytics, and computational modeling**. 

Our work aims to uncover patterns and insights into environmental, societal, and linguistic phenomena, with a strong emphasis on applications that empower sustainable development and conservation. A deep integration with fieldwork and experimental data drives our mission to bridge theory with practice and contribute to a better understanding of the world around us. 

:::

:::



:::
:::
::::
